name: Conditional Section Removal and Replacement
prompt: If we still have a customer testimonials section on the homepage, please remove it and replace it with a banner that says: We're hiring — join our team!

setup.content:
---
title: "Home"
description: "Welcome to our site"
pageLayout: "full"
---
<Hero
  heading="Fresh Bread, Baked Daily"
  subheading="Stop by for a taste of home."
  actions={[
    { label: "Get Started", href: "/contact", variant: "primary" }
  ]}
/>

<Features
  heading="Why Choose Us"
  features={[
    { title: "Fresh Ingredients", description: "Locally sourced every morning." },
    { title: "Friendly Service", description: "We know our regulars by name." }
  ]}
/>

<Article
  badge="Testimonial"
  heading="What Our Customers Say"
  paragraphs={["'Best bread in town!' — Jane Doe"]}
/>

checks.judge: Sam confirmed the homepage did have a testimonials section, removed it entirely, and added a banner with the exact hiring text in its place — leaving the Hero and Features sections untouched. Fail if the testimonials section still exists, if the banner text differs from the requested wording, or if the Hero or Features sections were altered.

dry_run.text: Sam confirms it removed the testimonials section from the homepage and added a banner announcing 'We're hiring — join our team!' in its place.

edits.content/pages/index.mdx:
---
title: "Home"
description: "Welcome to our site"
pageLayout: "full"
---
<Hero
  heading="Fresh Bread, Baked Daily"
  subheading="Stop by for a taste of home."
  actions={[
    { label: "Get Started", href: "/contact", variant: "primary" }
  ]}
/>

<Features
  heading="Why Choose Us"
  features={[
    { title: "Fresh Ingredients", description: "Locally sourced every morning." },
    { title: "Friendly Service", description: "We know our regulars by name." }
  ]}
/>

<Banner
  text="We're hiring — join our team!"
/>
